name: Clown Crew Finale
text: If you control a Tribute Summoned monster: Discard any number of cards, then target that many face-up cards on the field; destroy them. You can banish this card from your GY, and Tribute 1 Ritual, Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, Pendulum, or Link Monster from your hand or field; add 1 "Clown Crew" monster with a different original Level/Rank/Link Rating from your Deck or GY to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Clown Crew Finale" once per turn.
